basic_details.job_title: CSIR NIIST – Multi Tasking Staff – 2 Posts
basic_details.short_information: National Institute For Interdisciplinary Science (CSIR NIIST) Recruitment 2026 for posts of 2 Multi-Tasking Staff. Candidates with Matriculation or equivalent pass Can Apply Online. The online application opens on 16-05-2026, and closes on 15-06-2026. The candidate shall apply online through CSIR NIIST website.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026.
seo_tags: CSIR NIIST Multi-Tasking Staff Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
